top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
AND m.label IN (
    SELECT label 
    FROM molecule 
    WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogen%' OR label LIKE '%Carcinogen%' OR label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' OR label LIKE '%Carcinogenic%'
);

SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
AND m.label IN (
    SELECT label 
    FROM molecule 
    WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogen%' OR label LIKE '%Carcinogen%' OR label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' OR label LIKE '%Carcinogenic%'
);

SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM molecule m2 
    WHERE m2.molecule_id = m.molecule_id 
    AND (m2.label LIKE '%carcinogen%' OR m2.label LIKE '%Carcinogen%' OR m2.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' OR m2.label LIKE '%Carcinogenic%')
);

SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
AND (
    m.label LIKE '%carcinogen%' 
    OR m.label LIKE '%Carcinogen%' 
    OR m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' 
    OR m.label LIKE '%Carcinogenic%'
);

SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
AND m.label IN (
    SELECT label 
    FROM molecule 
    WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogen%' OR label LIKE '%Carcinogen%' OR label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' OR label LIKE '%Carcinogenic%'
);

SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM molecule m2
    JOIN atom a ON m2.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    WHERE m2.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
    AND a.element = 'C'
);

SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM molecule m2 
    WHERE m2.molecule_id = m.molecule_id 
    AND (m2.label LIKE '%carcinogen%' OR m2.label LIKE '%Carcinogen%' OR m2.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' OR m2.label LIKE '%Carcinogenic%')
);

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple'
AND m.label IN (
    SELECT label 
    FROM molecule 
    WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogen%' OR label LIKE '%Carcinogen%' OR label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' OR label LIKE '%Carcinogenic%'
);
